title: Yaar Aval Yaaro Lyrics MUK Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Lyrics: Thamarai
MOvie:  Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal
Music: GV Prakash Kumar

Yaar,
aval yaaro, aval yaaro, kanaa thaano
Yaaro,
nila thaano, vidai illa vinaa thaano

Vaaninn,
pulam thaandi, nilam theendum, mazhai thaano
Naalum,
aval illai, enil inge pizhaithaano

Unn maar meedhum,
thol meedhum naan thunginen
uyir ingeye pogattum enrenginen
karaigale illaa nathi, orey oru nathi

Orr aagaaya dhooram,
naan poginra podhum, en pakkathil nirpaal aval
Naan vilkindra neram,
pon kai rendum neelum, than kakkathil vaipaal aval

Naan kaalai pani,
nee pullin nuni, naan velaamal nee thaanginaai

Naan kelaa oli,
neethane mozhi, en osaikku porulaagiraai...oooo ho...

Yaar,
aval yaaro, aval yaaro, kanaa thaano
Yaaro,
nila thaano, vidai illa vinaa thaano

Naan thoongaadha podhum,
en thunbathin podhum, en annai pol kaathaai ennai
Pon vaan engum neeye,
vin meen aaginraaye, naan annaanthu paarpen unnai
Naan ketkum varam,
en vaazh naal thavam, un nanban indri verethadi

oh paara mugam
ne kaatum kanam, naan kuraamal saavenadi hooo hoo..

Yaar,
aval yaaro, aval yaaro, kanaa thaano
Yaaro,
nila thaano, vidai illa vinaa thaano

Vaaninn,
pulam thaandi, nilam theendum, mazhai thaano
Naalum,
aval illai, enil inge pizhaithaano

Unn maar meedhum,
thol meedhum naan thunginen
uyir ingeye pogattum enrenginen
karaigale illaa nathi, orey oru nathi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Yaar Aval Yaaro explores themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song is set during a poignant moment in Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal, highlighting the protagonist's feelings of yearning for his beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Mohammed Irfan and composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

Yaar Aval Yaaro was released on December 17, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaar Aval Yaaro, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and longing, encapsulating the essence of romance in Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal. The soothing melody, paired with heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai, evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This song beautifully conveys the emotional struggles of love, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced similar feelings. The gentle yet powerful delivery by Mohammed Irfan enhances the overall impact, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaar Aval Yaaro is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love, beautifully rendered by Mohammed Irfan. The collaboration with the talented lyricist Thamarai and music director GV Prakash Kumar creates a hauntingly beautiful experience. Dive into the emotional depths of Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal and let the soothing notes wash over you.
stanzaMeanings: Yaar, who is she, is she a dream? Who is she, is she the moon, or is it just an illusion?
Crossing the sky, searching for land, is it raining? Even today, she is not here, is it a mistake to be here?
On your face, on your body, I have slept, even if my life goes away, I have said it. There is no path, just one path.
When I am going far away, she stands beside me. When I am waiting, both her hands are in my hands, she keeps them safe.
I am the morning dew, you are the flower's fragrance, I cannot do without you.
I am the sound of the flute, you are the language, you are the meaning of my existence...oooo ho...
Yaar, who is she, is she a dream? Who is she, is she the moon, or is it just an illusion?
Crossing the sky, searching for land, is it raining? Even today, she is not here, is it a mistake to be here?
On your face, on your body, I have slept, even if my life goes away, I have said it. There is no path, just one path.

I cannot sleep, my pain is enough, like my mother, you are my light everywhere, I will see you as a shining fish, I will ask for a blessing, my days will be a penance, without you, there is no other friend.
Oh, the face that shows the moon, I will not die without you, hooo hoo..
Yaar, who is she, is she a dream? Who is she, is she the moon, or is it just an illusion?
Crossing the sky, searching for land, is it raining? Even today, she is not here, is it a mistake to be here?
On your face, on your body, I have slept, even if my life goes away, I have said it. There is no path, just one path.
